Integer.description: Arbitrary-precision integer type, auto-promotes from Fixnum to Bignum

String.description: Mutable sequence of bytes typically representing characters, supports interpolation

Symbol.description: Immutable interned string identifier, memory-efficient for repeated names

Array.description: Ordered collection of objects with integer indices and rich enumeration methods

Hash.description: Key-value collection maintaining insertion order with flexible key types

NilClass.description: Class of the nil singleton representing nothing, falsy in boolean context

TrueClass.description: Class of the true singleton boolean value

FalseClass.description: Class of the false singleton boolean value, the only falsy value besides nil

Proc.description: Encapsulated block of code as a first-class object, created with proc or lambda

Range.description: Represents an interval of values with a start and end, supports iteration and membership test

Regexp.description: Regular expression pattern for string matching, created with /pattern/ or Regexp.new

IO.description: Base class for input/output operations; STDIN, STDOUT, STDERR are instances

Enumerator.description: External iterator providing lazy evaluation and chaining with each, map, select
